name: Rollin 90s Neighborhood Crips
description: The Rollin' 90s Neighborhood Crips are a Crip set on the west side of South Los Angeles. They either branched off from or allied with the Rollin' 60s Crips (the '0' alliance formed at a 1983 party). Their rivalry with the Eight Tray Gangster Crips (shared with the 60s) defines much of their conflicts. They expanded to Nashville in the mid-1990s (East Nashville Crips, charged with 7 murders). In 2017, three members murdered Justin Holmes (mistaken for Eight Tray), drawing attention because defendant Cameron Terrell was a wealthy white teen. Have also expanded to Montreal, Canada.
